creator: root@koellers.net
text:
lsof does not build from Ports:

.......

cc  -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -DHASEFFNLINK=i_effnlink -DHASF_VNODE -DHASCPUMASK_T -DHASSBSTATE -DHAS_KVM_VNODE -DHAS_UFS1_2 -DHAS_NO_SI_UDEV -DHAS_SI_PRIV -DHAS_SYS_SX_H -DFREEBSDV=6000 -DHASFDESCFS=2 -DHASPSEUDOFS -DHASNULLFS -DHAS9660FS -DHAS_NO_ISO_DEV -DHASIPv6 -DHAS_STRFTIME -DLSOF_VSTR="6.3-RELEASE-p1" -I/usr/src/sys -O2 -c rnch.c
cc  -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -DHASEFFNLINK=i_effnlink -DHASF_VNODE -DHASCPUMASK_T -DHASSBSTATE -DHAS_KVM_VNODE -DHAS_UFS1_2 -DHAS_NO_SI_UDEV -DHAS_SI_PRIV -DHAS_SYS_SX_H -DFREEBSDV=6000 -DHASFDESCFS=2 -DHASPSEUDOFS -DHASNULLFS -DHAS9660FS -DHAS_NO_ISO_DEV -DHASIPv6 -DHAS_STRFTIME -DLSOF_VSTR="6.3-RELEASE-p1" -I/usr/src/sys -O2 -c rnmh.c
cc  -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -DHASEFFNLINK=i_effnlink -DHASF_VNODE -DHASCPUMASK_T -DHASSBSTATE -DHAS_KVM_VNODE -DHAS_UFS1_2 -DHAS_NO_SI_UDEV -DHAS_SI_PRIV -DHAS_SYS_SX_H -DFREEBSDV=6000 -DHASFDESCFS=2 -DHASPSEUDOFS -DHASNULLFS -DHAS9660FS -DHAS_NO_ISO_DEV -DHASIPv6 -DHAS_STRFTIME -DLSOF_VSTR="6.3-RELEASE-p1" -I/usr/src/sys -O2 -c snpf.c
ar cr liblsof.a ckkv.o cvfs.o dvch.o fino.o isfn.o lkud.o pdvn.o prfp.o  ptti.o rdev.o regex.o rmnt.o rnam.o rnch.o rnmh.o snpf.o
ranlib liblsof.a
cc  -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -DHASEFFNLINK=i_effnlink -DHASF_VNODE -DHASCPUMASK_T -DHASSBSTATE -DHAS_KVM_VNODE -DHAS_UFS1_2 -DHAS_NO_SI_UDEV -DHAS_SI_PRIV -DHAS_SYS_SX_H -DFREEBSDV=6000 -DHASFDESCFS=2 -DHASPSEUDOFS -DHASNULLFS -DHAS9660FS -DHAS_NO_ISO_DEV -DHASIPv6 -DHAS_STRFTIME -DLSOF_VSTR=\"6.3-RELEASE-p1\" -I/usr/src/sys -O2 -c dmnt.c
cc  -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -DHASEFFNLINK=i_effnlink -DHASF_VNODE -DHASCPUMASK_T -DHASSBSTATE -DHAS_KVM_VNODE -DHAS_UFS1_2 -DHAS_NO_SI_UDEV -DHAS_SI_PRIV -DHAS_SYS_SX_H -DFREEBSDV=6000 -DHASFDESCFS=2 -DHASPSEUDOFS -DHASNULLFS -DHAS9660FS -DHAS_NO_ISO_DEV -DHASIPv6 -DHAS_STRFTIME -DLSOF_VSTR=\"6.3-RELEASE-p1\" -I/usr/src/sys -O2 -c dnode.c
dnode.c: In function `get_lock_state':
dnode.c:113: error: structure has no member named `lf_flags'
dnode.c:115: error: structure has no member named `lf_id'
dnode.c:121: error: structure has no member named `lf_id'
dnode.c:129: error: structure has no member named `lf_start'
dnode.c:130: error: structure has no member named `lf_end'
dnode.c:134: error: structure has no member named `lf_type'
dnode.c:136: error: structure has no member named `lf_type'
dnode.c:138: error: structure has no member named `lf_type'
dnode.c:141: error: structure has no member named `lf_next'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /opt/ports/sysutils/lsof/work/lsof_4.80B.freebsd.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to build lsof on an 6.3-STABLE system
